title: Shedding Light on Dark Matter at the LHC with Machine Learning

models.name: NMSSM bino-higgsino blind-spot
models.description: Compressed singlino-higgsino spectrum with ML-enhanced LHC sensitivity

computational_tools.NMSSMTools: paper-pinned (not executed) — used by paper for spectrum, relic density, sigma_DD^SI
computational_tools.micrOMEGAs: paper-pinned (not executed) — used by paper for Omega_h2
computational_tools.MadGraph5_aMC@NLO: invoked offline via madgraph/run_mg5_production.py for sigma_prod benchmark
computational_tools.ML_pipeline: paper-pinned (not executed) — Z_BL, Z_MLL significance values

benchmark_groups.table_7: Groups 1-6, mu_eff 130-214 GeV range, sqrt(s)=14 TeV
benchmark_groups.table_8: Groups 7-9, mu_eff 220-320 GeV range, sqrt(s)=14 TeV
